title: App Settings - General
scenario: Verify that tapping the hamburger icon and selecting General in Poly Lens Menu opens a screen with Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses sections, and that going back returns to the Poly Lens Menu
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. On the Home screen, tap the App Settings (hamburger) icon located in the top-left or top-right corner.
3. From the menu that appears, select 'General'.
4. Observe the new screen that opens.
5. Verify that the General screen displays the following sections: Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses.
6. Tap the back button (either the system back button or the in-app back arrow).
7. Verify that the user is returned to the Poly Lens Menu (Home screen).
expected: Tapping the App Settings (hamburger) icon and selecting General opens a new screen displaying sections for Account, About, Notifications & Device Alerts, Privacy Policy, and Licenses. Tapping back returns the user to the Poly Lens Menu (Home screen).
